heading: Goonoo Goonoo vs Goonumbla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goonoo Goonoo, New South Wales and Goonumbla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goonoo Goonoo and Goonumbla have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Goonoo Goonoo or Goonumbla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goonoo Goonoo has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Goonumbla scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goonoo Goonoo scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Goonumbla scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goonoo Goonoo or Goonumbla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goonoo Goonoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
